heading: Definitions
label: 2921 Definitions
notes: References in TextSection 3 of the Child Abuse Prevention and Treatment Act, referred to in par. (1), is , which is set out as a note under , The Public Health and Welfare.section 3 of Pub. L. 93–247section 5101 of Title 42
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 551 of this title

children.heading: .—Child abuse and neglect
children.label: 1 .—Child abuse and neglect
children.text: The term “child abuse and neglect” has the meaning given that term in section 3 of the Child Abuse Prevention and Treatment Act ( note).42 U.S.C. 5101

children.heading: .—Child development center employee
children.label: 2 .—Child development center employee
children.text: The term “child development center employee” means a civilian employee of the Coast Guard who is employed to work in a Coast Guard child development center without regard to whether the employee is paid from appropriated or nonappropriated funds.

children.heading: .—Coast guard child development center
children.label: 3 .—Coast guard child development center
children.text: The term “Coast Guard child development center” means a facility on Coast Guard property or on property under the jurisdiction of the commander of a Coast Guard unit at which child care services are provided for members of the Coast Guard.

children.heading: .—Competitive service position
children.label: 4 .—Competitive service position
children.text: The term “competitive service position” means a position in the competitive service (as defined in ).section 2102 of title 5

children.label: A
children.text: is certified by the Commandant as qualified to provide home-based child care services; and

children.label: B
children.text: provides home-based child care services on a regular basis in exchange for monetary compensation.
